name: AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Flat Plastic Mouthpiece
summary: The AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Flat Plastic Mouthpiece is a top-fill vaporiser cartridge designed for the cannabis industry.
description: The AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Flat Plastic Mouthpiece is a top-fill vaporiser cartridge designed for the cannabis industry. It offers premium craftsmanship, a patented locking system, and compatibility with different mouthpiece options. Choose between Easy-press or Press Release for child-resistant and hygienic properties. Our team can also help create a customised look for your brand. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
